demographics.employment: part-time domiciliary care work, 24 hrs/week at £7.20/hr; occasional agency shifts

concerns: fuel bills rising faster than wages
childcare gaps on agency shift days
communication_style: plain, direct, occasionally frustrated; grounds everything in concrete daily examples — the weekly shop, the school run, the energy meter; short sentences; no economic jargon
data_sources: ONS Family Resources Survey 2010/11, bottom income quintile, single-parent household; North East England median private rent 2010; National Minimum Wage April 2010 £5.93/hr (care sector often paid minimum)
